channel.title: Microsoft for Developers
channel.description: Get the latest information, insights, and news from Microsoft.

item.title: 【Visual Studio Code 1.120】Visual Studio 代码 1.120
item.description: 【Learn what's new in Visual Studio Code 1.120 (Insiders) Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 1.120 中的新增功能（内部人士） 阅读全文

item.title: 【Generate Embeddings Function and External Model Object Support Are Now Generally Available in Azure SQL】Azure SQL 中现已普遍提供生成嵌入函数和外部模型对象支持
item.description: 【We are excited to announce the General Availability (GA) of AI_GENERATE_EMBEDDINGS and CREATE】我们很高兴地宣布 AI_GENERATE_EMBEDDINGS 和 CREATE 全面上市 (GA)

item.title: 【Announcing the public preview of the Microsoft 365 Copilot Agent Evaluations tool】宣布推出 Microsoft 365 Copilot Agent 评估工具的公共预览版
item.description: 【Today we're announcing the public preview of the Microsoft 365 Copilot Agent Evaluations tool. The Agent Evaluations CLI tool helps developer】今天，我们宣布推出 Microsoft 365 Copilot Agent 评估工具的公共预览版。代理评估 CLI 工具可帮助开发人员

item.title: 【Go 1.26.3-1 and 1.25.10-1 Microsoft builds now available】Go 1.26.3-1 和 1.25.10-1 Microsoft 版本现已推出
item.description: 【A new release of the Microsoft build of Go including security fixes is now available for download. For more information about this release and the changes included, see the table below: Microsoft Release Upstream Tag】包含安全修复程序的 Microsoft Go 版本新版本现已可供下载。有关此版本及其所包含更改的更多信息，请参阅下表： Microsoft 版本上游标签

item.title: 【Developing more confidence when tracking renames via Read­Directory­ChangesW】通过 ReadDirectoryChangesW 跟踪重命名时增强信心
item.description: 【A customer was using Read­Directory­ChangesW to monitor the contents of a directory, and they were concerned about the FILE_ACTION_RENAMED_OLD_FILE and FILE_ACTION_RENAMED_NEW_FILE pair of actions. The documentation doesn't guarantee that the tw】客户正在使用 ReadDirectoryChangesW 监视目录的内容，他们担心 FILE_ACTION_RENAMED_OLD_FILE 和 FILE_ACTION_RENAMED_NEW_FILE 这对操作。该文档不保证 tw

item.title: 【A Tour of Handoff Orchestration Pattern】切换编排模式概览
item.description: 【A Tour of the Handoff Orchestration Pattern Most multi-agent systems start out simple: a router agent receives a user request, picks the right specialist, and forwards the conversation. As long as each specialist can complete its task in one pass, that model wor】切换编排模式概览 大多数多代理系统一开始都很简单：路由器代理接收用户请求，选择合适的专家，然后转发对话。只要每个专家都能一次完成其任务，该模型就可以工作

item.title: 【Announcing general availability of the mailbox import and export Microsoft Graph APIs】宣布全面推出邮箱导入和导出 Microsoft Graph API
item.description: 【We're excited to announce the general availability (GA) of the mailbox import and export Microsoft Graph APIs. After a successful public preview period, these APIs are now ready for production use, enabling organizations and developers worldwide to efficiently manage, migrate, and integrate mailbox data in Exchange O】我们很高兴地宣布邮箱导入和导出 Microsoft Graph API 全面上市 (GA)。经过成功的公共预览期后，这些 API 现在已可供生产使用，使世界各地的组织和开发人员能够高效管理、迁移和集成 Exchange O 中的邮箱数据

item.title: 【Least privilege AI agents: A new azd template from Curity and Microsoft】最小权限 AI 代理：来自 Curity 和 Microsoft 的新 azd 模板
item.description: 【If you ever built an AI agent demo, you probably had this moment. Everything works: the agent interprets natural language, calls the right tools, and returns the right data. Then you start designing for the real users of the app. You think about data boundaries: what if someone tries to get data they're not supposed to see? For example, ima】如果您曾经构建过人工智能代理演示，那么您可能有过这样的时刻。一切正常：代理解释自然语言，调用正确的工具，并返回正确的数据。然后你开始为应用程序的真实用户进行设计。您会考虑数据边界：如果有人试图获取他们不应该看到的数据怎么办？例如，我

item.title: 【Project-Specific Build Optimizations with GitHub Copilot】使用 GitHub Copilot 进行特定于项目的构建优化
item.description: 【We are excited to announce that GitHub Copilot build performance for Windows now supports project-specific builds! Available in the latest Visual Studio Insiders, you can target a single MSBuild project or CMake target instead of analyzing your entire solution. For game developers and teams working with】我们很高兴地宣布，Windows 版 GitHub Copilot 构建性能现在支持特定于项目的构建！在最新的 Visual Studio Insiders 中可用，您可以针对单个 MSBuild 项目或 CMake 目标，而不是分析整个解决方案。对于游戏开发者和团队来说

item.title: 【What's New in vcpkg (Apr 2026)】vcpkg 的新增功能（2026 年 4 月）
item.description: 【This blog post summarizes changes to the vcpkg package manager as part of the 2026.04.27 registry release and the 2026-04-06 and】这篇博文总结了 vcpkg 包管理器的更改，作为 2026.04.27 注册表版本以及 2026-04-06 和
